idea-plugin.name: Vedix Research Workbench
idea-plugin.description:
Vedix turns a research topic into a venue-ready manuscript via cross-host CLI orchestration — literature review, hypothesis generation, experiment code, statistical reporting, and venue-formatted LaTeX/Word output.

This plugin wraps the Vedix CLI / SaaS API. Bring your own API key (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, OpenRouter, Mistral, Cohere) or sign in to Vedix.ai for a hosted SaaS experience.

  • Vedix: New Manuscript — start a research pipeline from a topic.
  • Vedix: Switch Venue — re-target an existing job to another publisher.
  • Side panel — anchored right; shows pipeline status.

action.description: Start a new Vedix research pipeline from a research topic
Switch the target venue for an existing Vedix job
